case_title: WAI PING CHIU VS. WAI KING CHIU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIU, WAI PING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIU, WAI KING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---DIANA LAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,180.68 FILED BY CHIU, WAI PING AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU, WAI KING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
